regime_fall.current_status: Simultaneous military escalation and diplomatic engagement continue with U.S.-Israeli strikes destroying Iranian military capabilities while a 5-day bombing pause and 15-point peace proposal remain under review; Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei faces severe internal fractures between IRGC hardliners and civilian government, compounded by unprecedented economic collapse, medicine shortages, and Iranian military capability degradation despite some defensive successes.
regime_fall.last_major_event: U.S. F-15 fighter jet shot down over Iranian territory on April 3, marking first confirmed U.S. aircraft loss, while U.S. officials confirmed destruction of Iran's air force, navy, and missile capability is achieved or underway, and Trump threatened strikes on every Iranian power plant if deal not reached within five days.
